'''Mike Cottrell''' is an actor who played an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] warrior in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].

Cottrell also appeared in such films as ''Flash Gordon'' and ''History of the World: Part One''.

{{Bio-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
It appears that Mike is wearing the [[Romba/Legends|Romba]] costume, however this Ewok as already been attributed to [[Debbie Lee Carrington]].

[[Category:Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi actors]]
